title: delphinium eriostylum var. eriostylum
intro: Delphinium eriostylum var. eriostylum, also known as the Chinese delphinium, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Delphinium eriostylum var. eriostylum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
